Please check it.";}i:27;a:13:{s:2:"id";s:9:"consent-3";s:10:"element_id";s:9:"consent-3";s:7:"form_id";s:17:"wrapper-2437-3946";s:12:"parent_group";s:0:"";s:4:"type";s:7:"consent";s:7:"options";a:0:{}s:4:"cols";s:2:"12";s:10:"conditions";a:0:{}s:10:"wrapper_id";s:17:"wrapper-2437-3946";s:8:"required";s:4:"true";s:11:"field_label";s:42:"Do you consent to the DSAU privacy policy?";s:19:"consent_description";s:5438:"<p>Yes, I agree with the privacy policy of the DSAU (listed below)</p> <p data-start="350" data-end="595">The Down Syndrome Association of the Upstate (DSAU) is committed to protecting and respecting your privacy. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal data when you interact with our website, services, or events.</p> <hr data-start="597" data-end="600"> <h4 data-start="602" data-end="636"><strong data-start="607" data-end="636">1. Information We Collect</strong></h4> <p data-start="637" data-end="696">We may collect the following types of personal information:</p> <ul data-start="697" data-end="1086"> <li data-start="697" data-end="774"><strong data-start="699" data-end="723">Contact Information:</strong> Name, email address, phone number, mailing address</li> <li data-start="775" data-end="886"><strong data-start="777" data-end="806">Event Participation Data:</strong> Information related to events you register for, donations, and other activities</li> <li data-start="887" data-end="1015"><strong data-start="889" data-end="918">Volunteering Information:</strong> If you sign up to volunteer, we may collect details related to your availability and preferences</li> <li data-start="1016" data-end="1086"><strong data-start="1018" data-end="1057">Fundraising & Donation Information:</strong> Payment and donation details</li> <li><strong data-start="1018" data-end="1057">Household Information:</strong> Including household income and household size, for the purpose of evaluating eligibility for grants, funding opportunities, and other financial assistance to the DSAU.</li> </ul> <hr data-start="1088" data-end="1091"> <h4 data-start="1093" data-end="1132"><strong data-start="1098" data-end="1132">2. How We Use Your Information</strong></h4> <p data-start="1133" data-end="1194">We use the information we collect for the following purposes:</p> <ul data-start="1195" data-end="1557"> <li data-start="1195" data-end="1285">To send you newsletters, event invitations, and updates about DSAU programs and services</li> <li data-start="1286" data-end="1347">To process donations, registrations, and other transactions</li> <li data-start="1348" data-end="1440">To communicate with you about volunteer opportunities, events, or other related activities</li> <li data-start="1441" data-end="1507">To personalize and improve your experience with our organization</li> <li data-start="1508" data-end="1557">To comply with legal and regulatory obligations</li> </ul> <hr data-start="1559" data-end="1562"> <h4 data-start="1564" data-end="1604"><strong data-start="1569" data-end="1604">3. Data Protection and Security</strong></h4> <p data-start="1605" data-end="1898">We take reasonable steps to protect the personal information you provide to us. Your data is stored securely and access is limited to authorized personnel only. While we strive to protect your information, please understand that no method of data transmission over the internet is 100% secure.</p> <hr data-start="1900" data-end="1903"> <h4 data-start="1905" data-end="1941"><strong data-start="1910" data-end="1941">4. Sharing Your Information</strong></h4> <p data-start="1942" data-end="2313">We do not sell your personal information to third parties. However, we may share your data with board members who help us manage our website, process payments, or send communications (e.g., email marketing services). </p> <hr data-start="2315" data-end="2318"> <h4 data-start="2320" data-end="2355"><strong data-start="2325" data-end="2355">5. Your Rights and Choices</strong></h4> <p data-start="2356" data-end="2378">You have the right to:</p> <ul data-start="2379" data-end="2678"> <li data-start="2379" data-end="2423">Access the personal data we hold about you</li> <li data-start="2424" data-end="2482">Request corrections to any inaccurate or incomplete data</li> <li data-start="2483" data-end="2555">Request that we delete your personal data (subject to applicable laws)</li> <li data-start="2556" data-end="2678">Opt-out- can terminate my membership with the DSAU by submitting a written notice to the DSAU Board.</li> </ul> <hr data-start="2680" data-end="2683"> <h4 data-start="2685" data-end="2730"><strong data-start="2690" data-end="2730">6. Cookies and Tracking Technologies</strong></h4> <p data-start="2731" data-end="2934">We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to enhance your experience on our website, analyze traffic, and personalize content. You can manage your cookie preferences through your browser settings.</p> <hr data-start="2936" data-end="2939"> <h4 data-start="2941" data-end="2971"><strong data-start="2946" data-end="2971">7. Children's Privacy</strong></h4> <p data-start="2972" data-end="3246">Our membership enrollment is intended for adults. We do not knowingly collect personal information from individuals under the age of 18. If we learn that we have collected personal data from a child under the age of 18, we will take steps to delete that information as soon as possible.</p> <hr data-start="3248" data-end="3251"> <h4 data-start="3253" data-end="3295"><strong data-start="3258" data-end="3295">8. Changes to This Privacy Policy</strong></h4> <p data-start="3296" data-end="3472">We may update this privacy policy periodically to reflect changes in our practices or legal obligations. Any updates will be posted on this page with an updated effective date.</p>";s:16:"required_message";s:40:"This field is required. Please check it.";}i:29;a:13:{s:2:"id";s:9:"consent-3";s:10:"element_id";s:9:"consent-3";s:7:"form_id";s:17:"wrapper-8833-8259";s:12:"parent_group";s:0:"";s:4:"type";s:7:"consent";s:7:"options";a:0:{}s:4:"cols";s:2:"12";s:10:"conditions";a:0:{}s:10:"wrapper_id";s:17:"wrapper-8833-8259";s:8:"required";s:4:"true";s:11:"field_label";s:42:"Do you consent to the DSAU privacy policy?";s:19:"consent_description";s:5840:"<div class="forminator-row"> <div class="forminator-field-consent forminator-col forminator-col-12" id="consent-3"> <div class="forminator-field"> <div class="forminator-checkbox__wrapper"> <div class="forminator-checkbox__label forminator-consent__label" id="forminator-field-consent-3_67ba199e35713__description"> <p data-end="595" data-start="350">The Down Syndrome Association of the Upstate (DSAU) is committed to protecting and respecting your privacy. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal data when you interact with our website, services, or events.</p> <hr data-end="600" data-start="597"> <h4 data-end="636" data-start="602"><strong data-end="636" data-start="607">1. Information We Collect</strong></h4> <p data-end="696" data-start="637">We may collect the following types of personal information:</p> <ul data-end="1086" data-start="697"> <li data-end="774" data-start="697"><strong data-end="723" data-start="699">Contact Information:</strong> Name, email address, phone number, mailing address</li> <li data-end="886" data-start="775"><strong data-end="806" data-start="777">Event Participation Data:</strong> Information related to events you register for, donations, and other activities</li> <li data-end="1015" data-start="887"><strong data-end="918" data-start="889">Volunteering Information:</strong> If you sign up to volunteer, we may collect details related to your availability and preferences</li> <li data-end="1086" data-start="1016"><strong data-end="1057" data-start="1018">Fundraising & Donation Information:</strong> Payment and donation details</li> <li><strong data-end="1057" data-start="1018">Household Information:</strong> Including household income and household size, for the purpose of evaluating eligibility for grants, funding opportunities, and other financial assistance to the DSAU.</li> </ul> <hr data-end="1091" data-start="1088"> <h4 data-end="1132" data-start="1093"><strong data-end="1132" data-start="1098">2. How We Use Your Information</strong></h4> <p data-end="1194" data-start="1133">We use the information we collect for the following purposes:</p> <ul data-end="1557" data-start="1195"> <li data-end="1285" data-start="1195">To send you newsletters, event invitations, and updates about DSAU programs and services</li> <li data-end="1347" data-start="1286">To process donations, registrations, and other transactions</li> <li data-end="1440" data-start="1348">To communicate with you about volunteer opportunities, events, or other related activities</li> <li data-end="1507" data-start="1441">To personalize and improve your experience with our organization</li> <li data-end="1557" data-start="1508">To comply with legal and regulatory obligations</li> </ul> <hr data-end="1562" data-start="1559"> <h4 data-end="1604" data-start="1564"><strong data-end="1604" data-start="1569">3. Data Protection and Security</strong></h4> <p data-end="1898" data-start="1605">We take reasonable steps to protect the personal information you provide to us. Your data is stored securely and access is limited to authorized personnel only. While we strive to protect your information, please understand that no method of data transmission over the internet is 100% secure.</p> <hr data-end="1903" data-start="1900"> <h4 data-end="1941" data-start="1905"><strong data-end="1941" data-start="1910">4. Sharing Your Information</strong></h4> <p data-end="2313" data-start="1942">We do not sell your personal information to third parties. However, we may share your data with board members who help us manage our website, process payments, or send communications (e.g., email marketing services). </p> <hr data-end="2318" data-start="2315"> <h4 data-end="2355" data-start="2320"><strong data-end="2355" data-start="2325">5. Your Rights and Choices</strong></h4> <p data-end="2378" data-start="2356">You have the right to:</p> <ul data-end="2678" data-start="2379"> <li data-end="2423" data-start="2379">Access the personal data we hold about you</li> <li data-end="2482" data-start="2424">Request corrections to any inaccurate or incomplete data</li> <li data-end="2555" data-start="2483">Request that we delete your personal data (subject to applicable laws)</li> <li data-end="2678" data-start="2556">Opt-out- can terminate my membership with the DSAU by submitting a written notice to the DSAU Board.</li> </ul> <hr data-end="2683" data-start="2680"> <h4 data-end="2730" data-start="2685"><strong data-end="2730" data-start="2690">6. Cookies and Tracking Technologies</strong></h4> <p data-end="2934" data-start="2731">We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to enhance your experience on our website, analyze traffic, and personalize content. You can manage your cookie preferences through your browser settings.</p> <hr data-end="2939" data-start="2936"> <h4 data-end="2971" data-start="2941"><strong data-end="2971" data-start="2946">7. Children's Privacy</strong></h4> <p data-end="3246" data-start="2972">Our membership enrollment is intended for adults. We do not knowingly collect personal information from individuals under the age of 18. If we learn that we have collected personal data from a child under the age of 18, we will take steps to delete that information as soon as possible.</p> <hr data-end="3251" data-start="3248"> <h4 data-end="3295" data-start="3253"><strong data-end="3295" data-start="3258">8. Changes to This Privacy Policy</strong></h4> <p data-end="3472" data-start="3296">We may update this privacy policy periodically to reflect changes in our practices or legal obligations. Any updates will be posted on this page with an updated effective date.</p> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> <div class="forminator-row forminator-row-last"> <div class="forminator-col"> </div> </div>";s:16:"required_message";s:40:"This field is required. Greetings

Thank you for signing up for your tickets to the Children's Museum of the Upstate.  

You will receive an email with the access code to receive your ticket(s).

Tickets may be used at either the Greenville or Spartanburg location.

Number of Tickets:  {radio-1}
Parent/Guardian/Chaperone:  {name-1}
Individual with Down Syndrome:  {name-2}

You'll be hearing from us soon

Down Syndrome Association of the Upstate
